┃ even when a cell is far longer than its header |                                                                                                                                                    █
 ┃ | Terminal background inheritance | Inherits the terminal background instead of painting its own | Inherits the terminal background instead of painting its own | This is the row that proves       █
 ┃ background parity across the two clients |                                                                                                                                                          █
 ┃ | Fenced code block styling | Preserves indentation and monospace alignment for every line | Preserves indentation and monospace alignment for every line | Long lines should be handled the same   █
 ┃ way by both renderers |                                                                                                                                                                             █
 ┃                                                                                                                                                                                                     █
 ┃ ```typescript                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 ┃ export const renderReference = (input: ReferenceInput): Effect.Effect<Rendered, RenderError> =>                                                                                                     █
 ┃   Effect.gen(function* () {                                                                                                                                                                         █
 ┃     const width = yield* Terminal.currentWidth                                                                                                                                                      █
 ┃     const wrapped = wrapParagraph(input.paragraph, width)                                                                                                                                           █
 ┃     const table = layoutTable(input.rows, { border: "rounded", inheritBackground: true })                                                                                                           █
 ┃     return { headings: input.headings, paragraph: wrapped, table }                                                                                                                                  █
 ┃   })                                                                                                                                                                                                █
 ┃ ```                                                                                                                                                                                                 ▂
 ┃                                                                                                                                                                                                     █
 ┃ The closing paragraph adds one more long wrapping line so the reviewer can compare the blank-row rhythm between the code block above and this final block of prose in both clients.                 █
                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 Heading level one for the rendering reference                                                                                                                                                         █
                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 Heading level two                                                                                                                                                                                     █
                                                                                                                                                                                                       █

                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 This paragraph is intentionally long so it exercises soft wrapping at both the wide and narrow terminal widths. It mixes bold text, italic text, and inline code so a reviewer can confirm that       █
 emphasis runs and inline code spans survive the wrap boundary without breaking the surrounding flow of the sentence.                                                                                  █
                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 ╭─────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮ █
 │ Capability              │ Rika behavior                                      │ Amp behavior                                   │ Notes about the difference                                        │ █
 ├─────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤ █
 │ Wide table cell         │ Renders inside a bounded rounded grid that keeps   │ Renders inside its own table frame with        │ Both must keep every column aligned even when a cell is far       │ █
 │ wrapping                │ the border intact                                  │ column separators                              │ longer than its header                                            │ █
 ├─────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤ █
 │ Terminal background     │ Inherits the terminal background instead of        │ Inherits the terminal background instead of    │ This is the row that proves background parity across the two      │ █
 │ inheritance             │ painting its own                                   │ painting its own                               │ clients                                                           │ █
 ├─────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤ █
 │ Fenced code block       │ Preserves indentation and monospace alignment for  │ Preserves indentation and monospace alignment  │ Long lines should be handled the same way by both renderers       │ █
 │ styling                 │ every line                                         │ for every line                                 │                                                                   │ █
 ╰─────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯ █
                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
     export const renderReference = (input: ReferenceInput): Effect.Effect<Rendered, RenderError> =>                                                                                                   █
       Effect.gen(function* () {                                                                                                                                                                       █
         const width = yield* Terminal.currentWidth                                                                                                                                                    █
         const wrapped = wrapParagraph(input.paragraph, width)                                                                                                                                         █
         const table = layoutTable(input.rows, { border: "rounded", inheritBackground: true })                                                                                                         █
         return { headings: input.headings, paragraph: wrapped, table }                                                                                                                                █
       })                                                                                                                                                                                              █
                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 The closing paragraph adds one more long wrapping line so the reviewer can compare the blank-row rhythm between the code block above and this final block of prose in both clients.                   █
                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 ┃ Without using any tools, write four detailed paragraphs, each at least sixty words, explaining how terminal user interfaces render markdown tables, headings, fenced code blocks, and soft-wrapped  █
 ┃ paragraphs. Be thorough and verbose.                                                                                                                                                                █
 ╭────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮

 │ Second queued follow-up prompt about table borders                                                                                                                                  Enter to steer │
